title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
